item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Joplin [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Joplin [Notes]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Joplin
(Notes)
Joplin is a city in Jasper and Newton counties in the southwestern corner of the U.S. state of Missouri. The bulk of the city is in Jasper County, while the southern portion is in Newton County. Joplin is the largest city located within both Jasper and Newton Counties – even though it is not the county seat of either county. With a population of 51,762 as of the 2020 census, Joplin is the 13th most-populous city in the state. The city covers an area of 35.69 square miles on the outer edge of the Ozark Mountains. Joplin is the main hub of the three-county Joplin-Miami, Missouri-Oklahoma Metro area, which is home to 210,077 people making it the 5th largest metropolitan area in Missouri. In May 2011, a violent EF5 tornado killed more than 150 people and destroyed one-third of the city.
NOTE: Im just the provider, not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Joplin
(Notes)
Joplin is a city in Jasper and Newton counties in the southwestern corner of the U.S. state of Missouri. The bulk of the city is in Jasper County, while the southern portion is in Newton County. Joplin is the largest city located within both Jasper and Newton Counties – even though it is not the county seat of either county. With a population of 51,762 as of the 2020 census, Joplin is the 13th most-populous city in the state. The city covers an area of 35.69 square miles on the outer edge of the Ozark Mountains. Joplin is the main hub of the three-county Joplin-Miami, Missouri-Oklahoma Metro area, which is home to 210,077 people making it the 5th largest metropolitan area in Missouri. In May 2011, a violent EF5 tornado killed more than 150 people and destroyed one-third of the city.
NOTE: Im just the provider, not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Joplin
(Notes)
Joplin is a city in Jasper and Newton counties in the southwestern corner of the U.S. state of Missouri. The bulk of the city is in Jasper County, while the southern portion is in Newton County. Joplin is the largest city located within both Jasper and Newton Counties – even though it is not the county seat of either county. With a population of 51,762 as of the 2020 census, Joplin is the 13th most-populous city in the state. The city covers an area of 35.69 square miles on the outer edge of the Ozark Mountains. Joplin is the main hub of the three-county Joplin-Miami, Missouri-Oklahoma Metro area, which is home to 210,077 people making it the 5th largest metropolitan area in Missouri. In May 2011, a violent EF5 tornado killed more than 150 people and destroyed one-third of the city.
NOTE: Im just the provider, not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Scribus [Printing]
item.itunes:title: Scribus [Printing]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Scribus
(Printing)
Scribus is free and open-source desktop publishing software available for most desktop operating systems. It is designed for layout, typesetting, and preparation of files for professional-quality image-setting equipment. Scribus can also create animated and interactive PDF presentations and forms. Example uses include writing newspapers, brochures, newsletters, posters, and books. The Scribus 1.4 series are the current stable releases, and the 1.5 series where developments are made available in preparation for the next stable release series, version 1.6. Scribus is written in Qt and released under the GNU General Public License. There are native versions available for Unix, Linux, BSD, macOS, Haiku, Microsoft Windows, OS/2 operating systems.
NOTE: Im not the devoleper, just provide the app.
[read more]
item.description:
Scribus
(Printing)
Scribus is free and open-source desktop publishing software available for most desktop operating systems. It is designed for layout, typesetting, and preparation of files for professional-quality image-setting equipment. Scribus can also create animated and interactive PDF presentations and forms. Example uses include writing newspapers, brochures, newsletters, posters, and books. The Scribus 1.4 series are the current stable releases, and the 1.5 series where developments are made available in preparation for the next stable release series, version 1.6. Scribus is written in Qt and released under the GNU General Public License. There are native versions available for Unix, Linux, BSD, macOS, Haiku, Microsoft Windows, OS/2 operating systems.
NOTE: Im not the devoleper, just provide the app.
[read more]

Scribus is free and open-source desktop publishing software available for most desktop operating systems. It is designed for layout, typesetting, and preparation of files for professional-quality image-setting equipment. Scribus can also create animated and interactive PDF presentations and forms. Example uses include writing newspapers, brochures, newsletters, posters, and books. The Scribus 1.4 series are the current stable releases, and the 1.5 series where developments are made available in preparation for the next stable release series, version 1.6. Scribus is written in Qt and released under the GNU General Public License. There are native versions available for Unix, Linux, BSD, macOS, Haiku, Microsoft Windows, OS/2 operating systems.
NOTE: Im not the devoleper, just provide the app.

item.title: Webcamoid [Webcam & Monitoring]

item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Webcamoid
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcamoid is a webcam app focused on providing all major features required by power users with a very simple and intuitive interface.
NOTE: Im not the developer, just provide the app.

item.title: Unformat Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Unformat Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Unformat Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Camcorder digital camera undelete software is helpful to restore all erased or accidently deleted pictures images snaps audio video files clips even when media is corrupted or memory card being pulled out while the camera is on. Download unformat digital camera to recover your missing data lost due to improper device handling, accidental removal, human error, software hardware malfunctions, virus attacks etc. Novelty camera video files restoration program has the ability to unerase all erased or infected jpg jpeg bmp png gif tiff riff mov wav midi 3gp mpeg audio video files clips from all crashed or formatted digital camera memory cards. Advanced digital camera pictures rescue software supports all raw formats of digicam including .x3f (Sigma), .erf (Epson), .fff (Imacon), .rwz (Rawzor), .orf (Olympus), .raf (Fuji), .3fr (Hasselblad), .cap .tif .iiq (Phase One), .crw .cr2 (Canon), .nef .nrw (Nikon), .tif .k25 .kdc .dcs .dcr .drf (Kodak), .mrw (Minolta), .dng (Adobe), .r3d (Red), .bay (Casio), .ptx .pef (Pentax), .mos (Leaf), .arw .srf .sr2 (Sony) etc. Digital camera data recovery software rescue deleted audio video files even when drive not formatted, drive not detected, abort retry etc messages are displayed on your device.Features:* No technical knowledge is required to operate it because of its user friendly GUI facility that helps users to recover lost pictures images without any loss.* Software successfully runs on all versions of windows operating system including Vista windows 7, 8, 10, and 11 etc.* Digital camera photos uneraser software can recover pictures images from virus infected memory stick duo, compact flash card, IDE, SATA, PCMCIA memory cards etc.* Restore virus infected jpg bmp png midi mov wav audio video files from formatted multimedia memory cards.

[read more]
item.description:
Unformat Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Camcorder digital camera undelete software is helpful to restore all erased or accidently deleted pictures images snaps audio video files clips even when media is corrupted or memory card being pulled out while the camera is on. Download unformat digital camera to recover your missing data lost due to improper device handling, accidental removal, human error, software hardware malfunctions, virus attacks etc. Novelty camera video files restoration program has the ability to unerase all erased or infected jpg jpeg bmp png gif tiff riff mov wav midi 3gp mpeg audio video files clips from all crashed or formatted digital camera memory cards. Advanced digital camera pictures rescue software supports all raw formats of digicam including .x3f (Sigma), .erf (Epson), .fff (Imacon), .rwz (Rawzor), .orf (Olympus), .raf (Fuji), .3fr (Hasselblad), .cap .tif .iiq (Phase One), .crw .cr2 (Canon), .nef .nrw (Nikon), .tif .k25 .kdc .dcs .dcr .drf (Kodak), .mrw (Minolta), .dng (Adobe), .r3d (Red), .bay (Casio), .ptx .pef (Pentax), .mos (Leaf), .arw .srf .sr2 (Sony) etc. Digital camera data recovery software rescue deleted audio video files even when drive not formatted, drive not detected, abort retry etc messages are displayed on your device.Features:* No technical knowledge is required to operate it because of its user friendly GUI facility that helps users to recover lost pictures images without any loss.* Software successfully runs on all versions of windows operating system including Vista windows 7, 8, 10, and 11 etc.* Digital camera photos uneraser software can recover pictures images from virus infected memory stick duo, compact flash card, IDE, SATA, PCMCIA memory cards etc.* Restore virus infected jpg bmp png midi mov wav audio video files from formatted multimedia memory cards.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Unformat Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Camcorder digital camera undelete software is helpful to restore all erased or accidently deleted pictures images snaps audio video files clips even when media is corrupted or memory card being pulled out while the camera is on. Download unformat digital camera to recover your missing data lost due to improper device handling, accidental removal, human error, software hardware malfunctions, virus attacks etc. Novelty camera video files restoration program has the ability to unerase all erased or infected jpg jpeg bmp png gif tiff riff mov wav midi 3gp mpeg audio video files clips from all crashed or formatted digital camera memory cards. Advanced digital camera pictures rescue software supports all raw formats of digicam including .x3f (Sigma), .erf (Epson), .fff (Imacon), .rwz (Rawzor), .orf (Olympus), .raf (Fuji), .3fr (Hasselblad), .cap .tif .iiq (Phase One), .crw .cr2 (Canon), .nef .nrw (Nikon), .tif .k25 .kdc .dcs .dcr .drf (Kodak), .mrw (Minolta), .dng (Adobe), .r3d (Red), .bay (Casio), .ptx .pef (Pentax), .mos (Leaf), .arw .srf .sr2 (Sony) etc. Digital camera data recovery software rescue deleted audio video files even when drive not formatted, drive not detected, abort retry etc messages are displayed on your device.Features:* No technical knowledge is required to operate it because of its user friendly GUI facility that helps users to recover lost pictures images without any loss.* Software successfully runs on all versions of windows operating system including Vista windows 7, 8, 10, and 11 etc.* Digital camera photos uneraser software can recover pictures images from virus infected memory stick duo, compact flash card, IDE, SATA, PCMCIA memory cards etc.* Restore virus infected jpg bmp png midi mov wav audio video files from formatted multimedia memory cards.

item.title: Library Barcodes Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Library Barcodes Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Library Barcodes Software
(Office Apps)
Do want to buy some utility that helps you to generate barcode labels in bulk? Just take a look at www.barcodelabelmaker.net refers to Library Barcodes software from that provides smart and unique printing facility to print crafted barcode labels using barcode printer. Advanced barcodes generator tool creates customized or personalized multicolor barcode tags and stickers in negligible time.

[read more]

item.title: Medicine Barcode Maker Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Medicine Barcode Maker Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabelmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Medicine Barcode Maker Tool
(Office Apps)
Are you facing troubles in creating your barcode tags, stickers, labels etc of your own style? Don't Worry! www.barcodelabelmakersoftware.com presents Medicine Barcode Maker Software which provides facility to generate and print eye-catching tags, labels, stickers, coupons, badges, wrist bands as per user requirements by using some properties like font, dimension, margins, bars, space etc. Advance Label maker application facilitates to efficiently scan and print all tags, stickers, coupons, bands, badges by using all types of barcodes printers and scanners. Medicine Barcode maker program enables to create labels, stickers, coupons and badges using linear/2 dimensional font standard.
[read more]

Medicine Barcode maker program enables to create labels, stickers, coupons and badges using linear/2 dimensional font standard.
[read more]

Medicine Barcode maker program enables to create labels, stickers, coupons and badges using linear/2 dimensional font standard.
[read more]

item.title: RareToonsIndia [E-Learning]
item.itunes:title: RareToonsIndia [E-Learning]
item.itunes:author: raretoonsindia1
item.itunes:summary:
RareToonsIndia
(E-Learning)
Raretoonsindia - The Go-To Site for Hindi Dubbed Anime
Raretoonsindia is a popular Indian website that provides Hindi dubbed versions of popular anime shows and movies. With its extensive collection of high-quality dubbed content, raretoonsindia has become the go-to platform for Hindi anime fans across India.

Why People Love Raretoonsindia

There are several key reasons why raretoonsindia has garnered such a loyal following among Hindi anime enthusiasts:

High-Quality Dubbed Content
The site offers anime dubbed in fluent, native-sounding Hindi. The dubbing is done professionally, ensuring the translation captures the essence of the original Japanese dialogues accurately. This high standard of dubbing allows viewers to fully enjoy the anime.

Extensive Content Library
Raretoonsindia houses hundreds of popular anime titles, with new shows and movies added frequently. Some of the fan-favorite anime series available in Hindi on the site include Dragon Ball Z, Naruto, Death Note, One Piece, Pokémon, Bleach, Attack on Titan, and many more.

Easy Accessibility -

The site has a smooth, user-friendly interface. It is easy to search for and access different anime series. Raretoonsindia is mobile-optimized as well, enabling viewers to watch their favorite shows on the go.

Raretoonsindia Completely Free -

All the content on raretoonsindia is available for free streaming and downloading. Viewers do not need to pay any subscription fees. This makes the site highly popular among India's anime lovers.

Why People Use Raretoonsindia

In addition to the reasons above, here are some other factors that drive people to use raretoonsindia:

Convenience - The site is a one-stop platform for Hindi dubbed anime. Viewers don't have to scour the internet to find shows in their preferred language.

Reliability - Raretoonsindia has been around for years. It has proven itself to be a stable, reliable source for Hindi anime content.

Community - The site fosters a sense of community among Hindi anime fans. Viewers can discuss shows on forums.

Legality - Raretoonsindia offers content in a legal, ethical manner, unlike some pirated anime sites.

What Makes Raretoonsindia Different

Raretoonsindia stands out from other anime streaming sites in the following ways:

Specialized niche - It specifically caters to Hindi anime viewers. Most sites focus on English subtitled or dubbed content.

Dubbing quality - The Hindi dubbing is professional grade. Many sites have subpar dubbed versions.

Content depth - Raretoonsindia houses both older classic anime as well as newly released shows and movies.

Ease of use - The straightforward interface and navigation makes watching anime hassle-free.

Free access - No need to deal with subscriptions or fees.

Accessing Raretoonsindia

Raretoonsindia is easy to access:

Website - Simply go to www.raretoonsindia.in on any browser.

Mobile app - Download the Android app from Google Play Store or use the iOS app from the App Store.

Supported devices - You can access the site from any desktop PC, laptop, smartphone, tablet, smart TV or streaming device.

Once on the site, you can browse anime shows by season, release year, genre tags, etc. Creating a free account unlocks additional features like requests, comments, favorites, watchlist etc.

Anime Content on Raretoonsindia

Raretoonsindia currently has over **500** popular anime titles available in Hindi. The library expands every month. You can find both classic shows like Pokémon, Yu-Gi-Oh!, Kochikame, Shin Chan, Doraemon etc. as well as trending recent releases like Jujutsu Kaisen, Demon Slayer, Attack on Titan Final Season, My Hero Academia etc.
The site covers a diverse range of genres including action, adventure, magic, supernatural, comedy, slice of life, sci-fi etc. Both long-running anime series as well as standalone OVAs and movies are available.

Is Raretoonsindia Legal?

Yes, raretoonsindia operates entirely legally. They obtain licenses and permissions for the anime content. The in-house team then dubs the shows into Hindi professionally.
The site complies with India's copyright laws. It does not host pirated content or enable illegal downloads. Users can enjoy their favorite anime on raretoonsindia without worrying about legality issues.

Raretoonsindia - Banned or Not ?

Raretoonsindia Banned. It has has been banned and blocked by Indian ISPs or authorities.
Some unofficial proxy sites claiming to provide raretoonsindia's content may have been banned in certain regions. However, the original site dead. Users can directly visit raretoonsindia.in to check last message by raretoonsindia team.

Conclusion

For Hindi anime lovers, raretoonsindia is undoubtedly the top platform providing dubbed content legally and ethically. The extensive content library, superb dubbing quality, reliability, community and convenience offered by raretoonsindia makes it a must-use site for enjoying the best anime in your preferred language.
[read more]
item.description:
RareToonsIndia
(E-Learning)
Raretoonsindia - The Go-To Site for Hindi Dubbed Anime
Raretoonsindia is a popular Indian website that provides Hindi dubbed versions of popular anime shows and movies. With its extensive collection of high-quality dubbed content, raretoonsindia has become the go-to platform for Hindi anime fans across India.

There are several key reasons why raretoonsindia has garnered such a loyal following among Hindi anime enthusiasts:

High-Quality Dubbed Content
The site offers anime dubbed in fluent, native-sounding Hindi. The dubbing is done professionally, ensuring the translation captures the essence of the original Japanese dialogues accurately. This high standard of dubbing allows viewers to fully enjoy the anime.

Extensive Content Library
Raretoonsindia houses hundreds of popular anime titles, with new shows and movies added frequently. Some of the fan-favorite anime series available in Hindi on the site include Dragon Ball Z, Naruto, Death Note, One Piece, Pokémon, Bleach, Attack on Titan, and many more.

Easy Accessibility -

The site has a smooth, user-friendly interface. It is easy to search for and access different anime series. Raretoonsindia is mobile-optimized as well, enabling viewers to watch their favorite shows on the go.

Why People Use Raretoonsindia

Convenience - The site is a one-stop platform for Hindi dubbed anime. Viewers don't have to scour the internet to find shows in their preferred language.

Reliability - Raretoonsindia has been around for years. It has proven itself to be a stable, reliable source for Hindi anime content.

Legality - Raretoonsindia offers content in a legal, ethical manner, unlike some pirated anime sites.

What Makes Raretoonsindia Different

Specialized niche - It specifically caters to Hindi anime viewers. Most sites focus on English subtitled or dubbed content.

Dubbing quality - The Hindi dubbing is professional grade. Many sites have subpar dubbed versions.

The site covers a diverse range of genres including action, adventure, magic, supernatural, comedy, slice of life, sci-fi etc. Both long-running anime series as well as standalone OVAs and movies are available.

The site complies with India's copyright laws. It does not host pirated content or enable illegal downloads. Users can enjoy their favorite anime on raretoonsindia without worrying about legality issues.

Raretoonsindia - Banned or Not ?

Raretoonsindia Banned. It has has been banned and blocked by Indian ISPs or authorities.
Some unofficial proxy sites claiming to provide raretoonsindia's content may have been banned in certain regions. However, the original site dead. Users can directly visit raretoonsindia.in to check last message by raretoonsindia team.

Conclusion

For Hindi anime lovers, raretoonsindia is undoubtedly the top platform providing dubbed content legally and ethically. The extensive content library, superb dubbing quality, reliability, community and convenience offered by raretoonsindia makes it a must-use site for enjoying the best anime in your preferred language.

RareToonsIndia
(E-Learning)
Raretoonsindia - The Go-To Site for Hindi Dubbed Anime
Raretoonsindia is a popular Indian website that provides Hindi dubbed versions of popular anime shows and movies. With its extensive collection of high-quality dubbed content, raretoonsindia has become the go-to platform for Hindi anime fans across India.

The site offers anime dubbed in fluent, native-sounding Hindi. The dubbing is done professionally, ensuring the translation captures the essence of the original Japanese dialogues accurately. This high standard of dubbing allows viewers to fully enjoy the anime.

Extensive Content Library
Raretoonsindia houses hundreds of popular anime titles, with new shows and movies added frequently. Some of the fan-favorite anime series available in Hindi on the site include Dragon Ball Z, Naruto, Death Note, One Piece, Pokémon, Bleach, Attack on Titan, and many more.

The site covers a diverse range of genres including action, adventure, magic, supernatural, comedy, slice of life, sci-fi etc. Both long-running anime series as well as standalone OVAs and movies are available.

Is Raretoonsindia Legal?

Yes, raretoonsindia operates entirely legally. They obtain licenses and permissions for the anime content. The in-house team then dubs the shows into Hindi professionally.
The site complies with India's copyright laws. It does not host pirated content or enable illegal downloads. Users can enjoy their favorite anime on raretoonsindia without worrying about legality issues.

Raretoonsindia - Banned or Not ?

Raretoonsindia Banned. It has has been banned and blocked by Indian ISPs or authorities.
Some unofficial proxy sites claiming to provide raretoonsindia's content may have been banned in certain regions. However, the original site dead. Users can directly visit raretoonsindia.in to check last message by raretoonsindia team.

Conclusion

For Hindi anime lovers, raretoonsindia is undoubtedly the top platform providing dubbed content legally and ethically. The extensive content library, superb dubbing quality, reliability, community and convenience offered by raretoonsindia makes it a must-use site for enjoying the best anime in your preferred language.
[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Undelete Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Undelete Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Undelete Tool
(Utilities)
Digital Camera Undelete program supports major brands including professional camera, digital video camera, novelty camera, point and shoot camera, novelty camera and many more. Picture undelete tool revives deleted picture saved in various file extensions including jpeg, png, wmf, tiff etc. Digital Camera Undelete software offers reliable and cost effective solution to restore deleted data lost due to virus attack, software failure and improper shutdown without any data loss reasons. www.digitalcameraundelete.com restores lost files and folder at user specified location for future usage. Proficient and efficient digital camera data recovery program regains lost or corrupted pictures and photos in an accurate way. Digital Camera Undelete software is finest solution to repair erased priceless photos, video films, photo collection in an easiest way. Inexpensive and easy to use digital camera files retrieval tool has safe and reliable way to regain accidentally deleted valuable images which are saved in any type of file formats. Digital Camera Undelete utility supports major Windows operating system like Windows7, Windows vista, Windows server etc. www.digitalcameraundelete.com provides better solution to repair missing or erased files and folder by click on a single mouse button. Digital camera data recovery application that is used to recover damaged photos without making any modification in the picture originality and gets back the images in same condition. www.digitalcameraundelete.com repairs missing, misplaced or formatted data in an effective manner.Features:-* Digital Camera Undelete utility supports all major brands including Kingston, Sony, Toshiba, Panasonic, LG electronics etc.* Digital camera files retrieval software restores missing photos, video files lost due to virus attack, corrupted media and so on.*Digital camera data recovery tool regains lost data without requiring any prior or technical skills to operate the software.

[read more]

Digital Camera Undelete Tool
(Utilities)
Digital Camera Undelete program supports major brands including professional camera, digital video camera, novelty camera, point and shoot camera, novelty camera and many more. Picture undelete tool revives deleted picture saved in various file extensions including jpeg, png, wmf, tiff etc. Digital Camera Undelete software offers reliable and cost effective solution to restore deleted data lost due to virus attack, software failure and improper shutdown without any data loss reasons. www.digitalcameraundelete.com restores lost files and folder at user specified location for future usage. [read more]

item.title: Advanced Youtube Client - AYC [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Advanced Youtube Client - AYC [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: adithyassekhar
item.itunes:summary:
Advanced Youtube Client - AYC
(Utilities)
Github: https://github.com/adithya-s-sekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc
Opencode: https://www.opencode.net/adithyassekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc (This is a WIP importing from Github)
Test out latest featues and bug fixes before everyone: Test builds available on telegram https://t.me/s/ayc_news

Advanced Youtube Client - AYC v4.19 - 17/Nov/2023

What's new?
- New: Subtitle languages can be selected.
- New: Subtitle type can be selected (as .srt or embedded into the file).
- New: Quickkey for reset.
- Fixed: Crashing on some urls.
- Fixed: Quotes and spaces crashing ayc in various inputs; urls, settings values, format codes.
- Fixed: Unexpected errorlevel checking.
- Fixed: Some formats failing with some configurations.
- Fixed: Temporary folder UI still showed invalid after an invalid path is fixed.
- Fixed: Download folder UI still showed invalid after an invalid path is fixed.
- Fixed: Failed batch downloads crashing AYC.
- Improved: Reset UI.
- Improved: Generic downloads UI.
- Improved: Input sanitization for all inputs.
- Updated: aria2c to v1.37.0
- Code cleanup and improvements.

AYC is a highly responsive, no nonsense, easy to use, fast video downloader from the text based era.

Features
- Supports Youtube, Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo and 100s of other websites that yt-dlp supports.
- Automatically saves video chapters, thumbnails, subtitles (User configurable).
- Supports downloading playlists, channels, keyword topic urls on multiple websites.
- Supports directly searching and downloading from youtube.
- Multithreaded downloads using aria2c to fully utilize the available bandwidth (User configurable).
- Batch mode can create jobs, save urls to them and download, resume, edit, delete.
- Extremely light and instantly responding text based ui.
- Easily editable batch script.
- Compatible with Windows 7 SP1/8/8.1/10/11 (32/64-bit).
- Downloads only. Does not convert to other formats. All formats are given by the website.
- Except for audio. Along with untouched M4A and OPUS audio straight from youtube, there is also a 128k CBR MP3 option.
- Everything is designed to help create muscle memory.

Installation
Note: Windows Defender will show a one-time warning before you try to start a batch file downloaded from the internet. You need to click More info and click Run Anyway for it to go away.

1. Download the latest AYC release from here.
2. Extract the ayc folder inside to anywhere on your computer (eg: C:\ayc). Do not extract inside Program Files.
3. Open AYClient.bat and follow the on screen instructions.

When you're done there'll be a shortcut created in ayc folder, on the desktop and in start menu. Open it to start using AYC.
[read more]
item.description:
Advanced Youtube Client - AYC
(Utilities)
Github: https://github.com/adithya-s-sekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc
Opencode: https://www.opencode.net/adithyassekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc (This is a WIP importing from Github)
Test out latest featues and bug fixes before everyone: Test builds available on telegram https://t.me/s/ayc_news

Advanced Youtube Client - AYC v4.19 - 17/Nov/2023

What's new?
- New: Subtitle languages can be selected.
- New: Subtitle type can be selected (as .srt or embedded into the file).
- New: Quickkey for reset.
- Fixed: Crashing on some urls.
- Fixed: Quotes and spaces crashing ayc in various inputs; urls, settings values, format codes.
- Fixed: Unexpected errorlevel checking.
- Fixed: Some formats failing with some configurations.
- Fixed: Temporary folder UI still showed invalid after an invalid path is fixed.
- Fixed: Download folder UI still showed invalid after an invalid path is fixed.
- Fixed: Failed batch downloads crashing AYC.
- Improved: Reset UI.
- Improved: Generic downloads UI.
- Improved: Input sanitization for all inputs.
- Updated: aria2c to v1.37.0
- Code cleanup and improvements.

AYC is a highly responsive, no nonsense, easy to use, fast video downloader from the text based era.

Features
- Supports Youtube, Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo and 100s of other websites that yt-dlp supports.
- Automatically saves video chapters, thumbnails, subtitles (User configurable).
- Supports downloading playlists, channels, keyword topic urls on multiple websites.
- Supports directly searching and downloading from youtube.
- Multithreaded downloads using aria2c to fully utilize the available bandwidth (User configurable).
- Batch mode can create jobs, save urls to them and download, resume, edit, delete.
- Extremely light and instantly responding text based ui.
- Easily editable batch script.
- Compatible with Windows 7 SP1/8/8.1/10/11 (32/64-bit).
- Downloads only. Does not convert to other formats. All formats are given by the website.
- Except for audio. Along with untouched M4A and OPUS audio straight from youtube, there is also a 128k CBR MP3 option.
- Everything is designed to help create muscle memory.

Installation
Note: Windows Defender will show a one-time warning before you try to start a batch file downloaded from the internet. You need to click More info and click Run Anyway for it to go away.

1. Download the latest AYC release from here.
2. Extract the ayc folder inside to anywhere on your computer (eg: C:\ayc). Do not extract inside Program Files.
3. Open AYClient.bat and follow the on screen instructions.

When you're done there'll be a shortcut created in ayc folder, on the desktop and in start menu. Open it to start using AYC.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Advanced Youtube Client - AYC
(Utilities)
Github: https://github.com/adithya-s-sekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc
Opencode: https://www.opencode.net/adithyassekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc (This is a WIP importing from Github)
Test out latest featues and bug fixes before everyone: Test builds available on telegram https://t.me/s/ayc_news

Advanced Youtube Client - AYC v4.19 - 17/Nov/2023

What's new?
- New: Subtitle languages can be selected.
- New: Subtitle type can be selected (as .srt or embedded into the file).
- New: Quickkey for reset.
- Fixed: Crashing on some urls.
- Fixed: Quotes and spaces crashing ayc in various inputs; urls, settings values, format codes.
- Fixed: Unexpected errorlevel checking.
- Fixed: Some formats failing with some configurations.
- Fixed: Temporary folder UI still showed invalid after an invalid path is fixed.
- Fixed: Download folder UI still showed invalid after an invalid path is fixed.
- Fixed: Failed batch downloads crashing AYC.
- Improved: Reset UI.
- Improved: Generic downloads UI.
- Improved: Input sanitization for all inputs.
- Updated: aria2c to v1.37.0
- Code cleanup and improvements.

AYC is a highly responsive, no nonsense, easy to use, fast video downloader from the text based era.

Features
- Supports Youtube, Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo and 100s of other websites that yt-dlp supports.
- Automatically saves video chapters, thumbnails, subtitles (User configurable).
- Supports downloading playlists, channels, keyword topic urls on multiple websites.
- Supports directly searching and downloading from youtube.
- Multithreaded downloads using aria2c to fully utilize the available bandwidth (User configurable).
- Batch mode can create jobs, save urls to them and download, resume, edit, delete.
- Extremely light and instantly responding text based ui.
- Easily editable batch script.
- Compatible with Windows 7 SP1/8/8.1/10/11 (32/64-bit).
- Downloads only. Does not convert to other formats. All formats are given by the website.
- Except for audio. Along with untouched M4A and OPUS audio straight from youtube, there is also a 128k CBR MP3 option.
- Everything is designed to help create muscle memory.

Installation
Note: Windows Defender will show a one-time warning before you try to start a batch file downloaded from the internet. You need to click More info and click Run Anyway for it to go away.

1. Download the latest AYC release from here.
2. Extract the ayc folder inside to anywhere on your computer (eg: C:\ayc). Do not extract inside Program Files.
3. Open AYClient.bat and follow the on screen instructions.

When you're done there'll be a shortcut created in ayc folder, on the desktop and in start menu. Open it to start using AYC.
